/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -std=gnu++17 -O3 -fno-rtti -Wno-deprecated -Werror -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/svf-example.dir/src/svf-example.cpp.o" -o svf-example   -L/home/eshaan/btp_work/SVF/llvm-18.1.0.obj/lib  -L/home/eshaan/btp_work/SVF/Debug-build/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/eshaan/btp_work/SVF/llvm-18.1.0.obj/lib:/home/eshaan/btp_work/SVF/Debug-build/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz3.so /home/eshaan/btp_work/SVF/llvm-18.1.0.obj/lib/libLLVM.so.18.1rc -lSvfLLVM -lSvfCore -lz3
